mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0501_01-03_1#Sql001 */ T9N_INFO_CAT , T9N_NAME , T9N_REQUIRED_FLG AS REQUIRED_FLAG FROM PSITE_T9N_INFO_CAT WHERE T9N_DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY T9N_SORT ASC

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0501_01-03_1#Sql002 */ T4N_ID AS NOTIFICATION_ID , T4N_TITLE AS TITLE , T4N_CONTENT AS CONTENTS , T4N_CREATED_AT AS REGISTER_DAY_TIME , T4N_MEM_NUM , T4N_FILE1 AS ATTACH_FILE_NAME1 , T4N_FILE2 AS ATTACH_FILE_NAME2 , T4N_FILE3 AS ATTACH_FILE_NAME3 , T4N_CAT1 AS DOCUMENT_KIND_INPUT1 , T4N_FILE_COM1 AS ATTACH_FILE_COMMENT1 , T4N_FILE_COM2 AS ATTACH_FILE_COMMENT2 , T4N_FILE_COM3 AS ATTACH_FILE_COMMENT3 , T4N_URL AS URL , COR_URL_COM AS URL_COMMENT , COR_REFERENCE_CONDITION , COR_DISCLAIMER AS DISCLAIMER , COR_READ_FLG , COR_CREATE_BY AS CREATE_BY , COR_UPDATE_DATE AS UPDATE_TIME , COR_UPDATE_BY AS UPDATE_USER FROM PSITE_T4N_INFO WHERE T4N_ID = TO_NUMBER(#{req.notificationId})
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0501_01-03_1#Sql008 */ FILE_DIR AS FILE_DIRECTORY FROM TB_MED_TEMP_FILE_DIR WHERE FUNC_ID = #{req.functionId} AND CAT_ID = #{req.t9nInfoCat}
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL /* @SQLID=SUB0501_01-03_1#Sql004 */
WHEN NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM PSITE_T4N_INFO_PRIV WHERE T4N_ID = TO_NUMBER(#{req.notificationId}) AND PRIV_ID = #{item} ) THEN INTO PSITE_T4N_INFO_PRIV( T4N_ID , PRIV_ID , COR_CREATE_DATE , COR_CREATE_BY , COR_UPDATE_DATE , COR_UPDATE_BY ) VALUES( TO_NUMBER(#{req.notificationId}) , #{item} , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{req.createBy} , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{req.updateUser} )
SELECT * FROM DUAL

insert.foreach: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0501_01-03_1#Sql005 */ INTO PSITE_T5N_INFO_READ ( T5N_ID, T5N_INFO_ID, T5N_FA_ID, T5N_READ_FLG, T5N_READ_AT, T5N_LOGIN ) SELECT SEQ_PSITE_T5_INFO_READ.nextval, TO_NUMBER(#{req.notificationId}), '', '0', '', #{item} FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PSITE_T5N_INFO_READ WHERE T5N_INFO_ID = TO_NUMBER(#{req.notificationId}) AND T5N_LOGIN = #{item} )
